name: question
description: Quick side-question alias for Claude Code's built-in `/btw`. Two trigger commands: `/question <text>` (primary, fully spelled) and `/q <text>` (2-character alias). Same semantics as /btw — answer briefly (1-3 sentences), then resume the main work. Plugin command (markdown only, no script). Triggers: /question · /q · quick question · 잠깐 · 사이드 질문.
